evidence_items.citation_ref: Stadt Neuss: Entwurf der Kommunalen Wärmeplanung (2025), Zonierungskarte hochauflösend.
evidence_items.extracted_claim: The Norf/Elvekum residential core south-west of the S-Bahn station is officially designated as a zone for individual solutions (Prüfgebiet Einzellösungen).
No existing district heating pipes or planned network expansion zones are registered within the residential Norf segment cluster.
